'''Woosha plants''' grew on [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]]. They were eaten by [[Muudabok]]s, and glowed. They were also exported; some of these plants could be found in the [[Narsacc Habitat]] on [[Toryaz Station]], in the [[Kuat system/Legends|Kuat system]]. The woosha plant was used to make photo-imaging devices and to treat sunburns.

{{Nature-stub}}
